data.title: Greeks.live: Nearly $6 billion in options were delivered this week, including 41,000 BTC options
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Greeks.live macro researcher Adam released data showing that on July 18, 41,000 BTC options expired, with a Put Call Ratio of 0.78, a maximum pain point of $114,000, and a nominal value of $4.93 billion. 240,000 ETH options expired, with a Put Call Ratio of 1.0, a maximum pain point of $2,950, and a nominal value of $880 million.
This week, nearly $6 billion in options were delivered, accounting for more than 10% of the current total positions. From the main options data, in terms of implied volatility, BTC's IV rebounded slightly, and the main term IV was fully maintained at 40%. ETH's IV rose sharply, with the main term as high as 70%, but ETH has a large room for both rise and fall, and sellers have not yet reached the time to enter the market.

data.title: DOGE News: Dogecoin Eyes 300% Rally as Double Bottom Forms and On-Chain Metrics Flash Green
data.description: Key Takeaways:DOGE has gained 18% this week and is forming a bullish double bottom pattern on the daily chart.A breakout above $0.25 could trigger a 300% rally toward $1 by end of 2025, according to technical and historical signals.On-chain data shows rising open interest, growing spot demand, and reduced selling pressure from long-term holders.Dogecoin (DOGE) is showing strong signs of a major bullish breakout as key technical and on-chain metrics align. The memecoin is currently trading above $0.24 after gaining 18% this week, and analysts say the setup could fuel a 300% rally if one critical price level is reclaimed.DOGE has formed a double bottom reversal pattern on the daily chart, with the neckline positioned at $0.25. A confirmed breakout above this level could pave the way for a move to $0.48—last seen in December 2024—and potentially open the door to $1 by year-end, according to trader projections.DOGE Forms Bullish Double Bottom After Breaking DowntrendDogecoin’s price recently broke out of a long-term descending trendline, signaling a shift in momentum. After surging to $0.243, DOGE entered a consolidation range between $0.19 and $0.21, widely interpreted as a healthy retest of the breakout zone.A daily close above $0.25 would complete the double bottom structure and trigger further upside, analysts say.On the weekly chart, DOGE is also trading within an ascending broadening wedge, a pattern associated with parabolic breakouts. According to crypto analyst Trader Tardigrade, the asset appears poised to test the upper boundary of the wedge, a move that could “set the foundation for a 300% rally.”“Once DOGE reclaims the $0.25 neckline, the path to $0.47 and even $1 becomes technically viable,” Tardigrade said in a post.Open Interest and Spot Demand Signal Real MomentumOn-chain data adds weight to the bullish outlook. DOGE’s futures open interest (OI) has soared 67% in July, rising from $1.70 billion to $2.85 billion, indicating renewed speculative interest in the asset.Importantly, funding rates remain neutral, suggesting that the rally isn’t overheated by excessive leverage—a sign that momentum could continue without immediate reversal risk.In the spot market, cumulative volume delta (CVD) continues to climb, indicating net spot buying pressure. This trend signals that real demand—not just derivatives speculation—is supporting DOGE’s upward move.Long-Term Holders Signal Reduced Selling PressureDogecoin’s Long-Term Holder Net Unrealized Profit/Loss (LTH-NUPL) indicator has now entered the “Optimism-Anxiety” zone, a historical precursor to major rallies. This psychological threshold means long-term holders are sitting on moderate profits and are less likely to sell, allowing new capital inflows to drive price higher.This same LTH-NUPL transition was seen before DOGE’s explosive rallies in 2021 and 2024, reinforcing bullish expectations.“Long-term holders shifting from fear to cautious optimism has historically marked the early stages of DOGE’s biggest rallies,” noted on-chain analysts at IntoTheBlock.What Comes Next?If DOGE confirms a breakout above $0.25, the next major target lies at $0.47–$0.48, followed by $1 if macro and market momentum continue. Analysts caution that rejection at the neckline could lead to short-term consolidation, but the broader structure remains bullish.With rising interest from retail and institutional investors, a healthier spot market, and historical breakout signals in play, Dogecoin’s 2025 run may be just beginning, according to Cointelegraph.

data.title: Binance: Users holding at least 165 Alpha Points can claim 1,000 TAKER tokens airdrop
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, Binance will launch Taker Protocol (TAKER), and trading will start at 18:00 (UTC+8) on July 18, 2025. After trading starts, users who hold at least 165 Binance Alpha points can apply for 1,000 TAKER tokens airdrop. First come, first served, until the airdrop pool is full or the event ends.
Please note that claiming the airdrop will consume 15 Binance Alpha points. Users must confirm the claim within 24 hours on the Alpha event page, otherwise it will be deemed to have given up the airdrop.

data.title: Ethereum News: Ethereum Gains Institutional Momentum as Stablecoins and RWAs Drive Wall Street Inflows
data.description: Key Takeaways:Wall Street firms are increasingly accumulating ETH as stablecoin growth and real-world asset (RWA) tokenization expand on Ethereum.Ethereum now hosts over 54% of stablecoins and is positioning itself as a “reserve asset” for the onchain dollar economy.SharpLink Gaming ups equity sale to $6B to buy ETH for its treasury, holding over 321,000 ETH after a $425M Consensys-led deal.Fidelity and Electric Capital reports frame ETH as digital oil, a store of value, and sovereign economic infrastructure.Wall Street Bets Big on Ethereum as Stablecoin and RWA Use Cases AccelerateEthereum is rapidly becoming the top institutional bet in crypto’s next phase of growth. As the backbone of the onchain dollar and tokenized real-world asset ecosystems, Ethereum’s evolving role is attracting major Wall Street firms, hedge funds, and asset managers.Over 54% of all stablecoins now operate on Ethereum, positioning it as the reserve layer for a rising global digital dollar economy. Simultaneously, the network is powering the next wave of real-world asset (RWA) tokenization—everything from tokenized treasuries to private loans.ETH Price Up 23% This Week, But Still Below ATHEther (ETH) surged 23% over the past week, significantly outperforming Bitcoin’s 13% gain and the broader market’s 10% rise. Despite reaching $3,644, ETH remains far from its 2021 all-time high of $4,855, offering upside potential as institutional narratives take hold.ETH Viewed as a Reserve Asset Backing the Onchain DollarAccording to a new Electric Capital report, Ethereum leads stablecoin issuance with over $200 billion in circulation, and $4 billion of that in yield-bearing stablecoins. The report outlines three must-haves for digital dollar infrastructure: accessibility, security, and neutrality—Ethereum is the only blockchain consistently delivering all three.As stablecoins mature into financial products with yield, Ethereum’s dominance makes ETH an emerging reserve asset akin to Treasurys or gold. ETH already backs over $19 billion in loans and provides non-custodial, stakable collateral across DeFi protocols. Analysts believe ETH could eventually absorb a share of the $500 trillion global store-of-value market.Fidelity: Ethereum Is a Sovereign Digital EconomyA recent Fidelity report frames Ethereum not as a Web2 platform, but as a sovereign digital economy with ETH functioning as both store of value and medium of exchange.Fidelity applies a GDP-like framework to Ethereum’s economy:“Consumption” = protocol fees“Government” = Ethereum Foundation spending“Investment” = ETH staking and DEX liquidity“Net exports” = value flows via DePIN, stablecoins, RWAsEthereum now hosts over 2.5 million daily active wallets and records 19 million transactions daily, according to Artemis. This increasing usage supports the view that ETH demand scales with the ecosystem.ETH as Digital Oil: Low Fees and Real YieldA third thesis from leading Ethereum stakeholders describes ETH as “digital oil”—a yield-bearing commodity that fuels the onchain economy. With transaction fees reduced via layer-2 (L2) scaling, Ethereum has sacrificed short-term fee revenue (down from $82M to $3M daily) to support mass adoption and long-term ETH value accrual through staking and ETH burn.ETH now serves multiple functions:Fuel for computation and transactionsCollateral for DeFi and RWAsReserve asset for stablecoinsYield source through stakingThis multi-role architecture positions Ethereum as the backbone of the decentralized financial stack.SharpLink Gaming Raises $6B to Expand ETH TreasuryIn a major vote of confidence, SharpLink Gaming (NASDAQ: SBET), the largest corporate ETH holder, has increased its stock sale target from $1 billion to $6 billion to fund ETH accumulation.The company has:Already sold $721 million in common stockAdded a new $5 billion equity issuanceGrown its ETH holdings to 321,000 ETH, worth $1.1 billionA recent $425 million private placement led by Consensys helped fund this accumulation. Ethereum co-founder Joseph Lubin also joined SharpLink’s board as chairman following the deal.SharpLink’s ETH strategy mirrors early Bitcoin treasury plays by MicroStrategy—only this time, the focus is Ethereum as programmable, productive capital.Institutional demand is no longer limited to Bitcoin. With Wall Street embracing Ethereum’s role in powering stablecoins, tokenized RWAs, and sovereign blockchain economies, ETH is now viewed as digital oil, digital gold, and a digital reserve currency—all in one asset.If ETF flows, TradFi alignment, and L2 scalability continue to accelerate, analysts say Ethereum could follow Bitcoin into a new phase of institutional-led price discovery.

data.title: UK Officer Stole $6M Bitcoin in Silk Road 2.0 Case — What It Means for SHIB
data.description:
Summary: What happened in the Silk Road 2. 0 case involving ex-NCA officer Paul Chowles? Paul Chowles, a former UK crime investigator, stole 50 Bitcoin during the Silk Road 2. 0 probe. He laundered the funds through a crypto mixer and cashed out nearly $757,000
source: https://news.shib.io/2025/07/18/uk-officer-stole-6m-bitcoin-in-silk-road-2-0-case-what-it-means-for-shib/

data.title: Volcon Just Went Full Bitcoin—Stock Explodes 135% After Treasury Pivot
data.description:
Volcon, the innovative electric vehicle company, has just made a significant shift in its financial strategy by fully embracing Bitcoin as part of its operations. As a result of this bold move, the company's stock has experienced a remarkable surge, skyrocketing by an impressive 135% following a strategic pivot announced by the Treasury. This development not only highlights Volcon's commitment to staying at the forefront of the rapidly evolving cryptocurrency landscape but also signals growing investor confidence in the company's future prospects amid changing economic dynamics.
source: https://blocknews.com/volcon-just-went-full-bitcoin-stock-explodes-135-after-treasury-pivot/

data.title: OKX's net inflow of ETH exceeded $2 million in the past hour
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News OKLink chain data shows that in the past hour, the OKX trading platform has inflowed about 3.8 million US dollars of ETH, outflow amount is 1.76 million US dollars, and net inflow exceeds 2.04 million US dollars. More than 90% of the funds come from non-exchange addresses on the chain, indicating that users actively transfer ETH to the platform, which may be related to the strengthening of market sentiment.
According to OKX market data, ETH continued to rise today, breaking through 3674 US dollars in a short time, and the increase in 24 hours exceeded 7%. Since the low of 1384 US dollars on April 9, 2025, the cumulative rebound has exceeded 165%, and the current price is about 24% away from the historical high of 4871 US dollars.

data.title: Smart Money Invests Heavily in Ethereum After Previous Bitcoin Success
data.description:
According to PANews, a savvy investor known for profiting $5. 16 million by shorting Bitcoin during the LUNA/UST collapse has recently made a significant purchase of 2,172 ETH, valued at $7. 46 million, with an average buying price of $3,437. This move comes six months after their last major activity
source: https://www.binance.com/en/square/post/27092391721409?utm_source=BinanceNewsRSS

data.title: Fidelity's Jurrien Timmer Compares Bitcoin Growth to Internet Expansion
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, Jurrien Timmer, the Global Macro Director at Fidelity, has drawn parallels between Bitcoin's growth and the rise of the internet. Timmer highlighted that Bitcoin's growth trajectory closely mirrors the adoption curve of the internet over the past few decades. Timmer noted that Bitcoin continues to follow a power-law curve in terms of wallet numbers, aligning with a demand model he developed based on internet adoption rates. He suggested that Bitcoin is currently in the middle phase of this growth curve
source: https://www.binance.com/en/square/post/27092087094386?utm_source=BinanceNewsRSS

data.title: MEI Pharma Launches $100 Million Litecoin Treasury Strategy
data.description: According to Foresight News, Nasdaq-listed MEI Pharma has announced the launch of a $100 million Litecoin treasury strategy. This initiative marks a significant move by the company into the cryptocurrency space, reflecting a growing trend among corporations to diversify their financial strategies with digital assets.

data.title: Smart Money Invests Heavily in Ethereum After Previous Bitcoin Success
data.description: According to PANews, a savvy investor known for profiting $5.16 million by shorting Bitcoin during the LUNA/UST collapse has recently made a significant purchase of 2,172 ETH, valued at $7.46 million, with an average buying price of $3,437. This move comes six months after their last major activity. Previously, this account had successfully capitalized on Bitcoin and Wrapped Bitcoin (WBTC) investments, earning $7.41 million, and had also gained $3.02 million from Ethereum investments.

data.title: Fidelity's Jurrien Timmer Compares Bitcoin Growth to Internet Expansion
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, Jurrien Timmer, the Global Macro Director at Fidelity, has drawn parallels between Bitcoin's growth and the rise of the internet. Timmer highlighted that Bitcoin's growth trajectory closely mirrors the adoption curve of the internet over the past few decades.

Timmer noted that Bitcoin continues to follow a power-law curve in terms of wallet numbers, aligning with a demand model he developed based on internet adoption rates. He suggested that Bitcoin is currently in the middle phase of this growth curve.

The analysis indicates that Bitcoin's current price pattern, characterized by 'stair-step increases and consolidation,' reflects its status as a maturing yet unsaturated asset class.

Regarding the influx of capital into Bitcoin, Timmer remarked that it remains uncertain whether these funds are from long-term believers or short-term speculators.

data.title: The top-ranked user of the Binance Trading Alliance team closed a 10x ETH short position, losing $2.763 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reported that according to the monitoring of Ai Yi, an on-chain analyst, the contract user "If I Don't Understand", who ranked first in the Binance Trading Alliance Team Competition, has just closed all his positions at a loss. The opening price was US$3,406.8 and the average closing price was US$3,654.19. In the end, his ETH 10x short position lost US$2.763 million.

data.title: OpenAI to Utilize Google Cloud for ChatGPT Services
data.description: According to PANews, OpenAI has announced plans to operate ChatGPT on Google Cloud services. Previously reliant on Microsoft's Azure cloud services, this move marks a significant step as the company aims to reduce its dependence on Microsoft. As per OpenAI's 'sub-processor list,' Google Cloud will support ChatGPT's enterprise, education, team, and API services, catering to users in the United States, United Kingdom, Japan, Norway, and the Netherlands. Regular users may not notice whether they are accessing ChatGPT through Google Cloud.

data.title: ZachXBT Highlights Challenges in Evaluating Crypto Traders' Performance
data.description: According to PANews, blockchain investigator ZachXBT shared insights on the X platform regarding the evaluation of crypto traders. He emphasized that he focuses on traders who have consistently performed well over the long term, such as HighstakesCapital, as their public profit and loss records are difficult to falsify. However, he noted that many of these traders no longer share their perspectives. ZachXBT stressed the importance of longevity, pointing out that numerous crypto influencers create new accounts or avoid transparency after experiencing high-leverage losses or lucky gains. He also mentioned that 95% of traders on crypto platforms primarily profit from selling courses and paid group memberships, suggesting that following incompetent accounts can contribute to increased noise in the market.

data.title: ETH/BTC Exchange Rate Surges by 69% Since April
data.description: According to Foresight News, the exchange rate between Ethereum (ETH) and Bitcoin (BTC) has surpassed 0.03. This marks a significant increase of 69% from the rate of 0.01767 recorded on April 22. The rise in the ETH/BTC rate highlights the growing strength of Ethereum in the cryptocurrency market.
